creator: edwin@mavetju.org
text:
man XMoveWindow gives an empty page.

[~] edwin@k7>locate XMoveWindow
/usr/local/man/man3/XMoveWindow.3.gz
[~] edwin@k7>gzcat /usr/local/man/man3/XMoveWindow.3.gz
.so man3/XConfigureWindow.3

Maybe because XConfigureWindow.3 is actually a .gz file:
[~] edwin@k7>locate XConfigureWindow
/usr/local/man/man3/XConfigureWindow.3.gz
